videoJson.name: Betacam
videoJson.fact1: A blank Betamax  tape can work on a Betacam deck and a Betacam  tape can be used to record in  a Betamax deck (although  this practice is not  recommended)
videoJson.fact2: The format is a higher- quality successor of Betamax  intended for professional  broadcast use instead of  home consumer use; unlike  Betamax, Betacam became  the dominant broadcast  format of its era.
videoJson.fact3: Betacam came in  several different  formats; they all  use the same  cassette sizes  but had different  shell colors
